summary: A clip from a Fox News segment with a FOX NEWS LIVE banner. It shows a split screen of a studio anchor and a woman interviewed by video link from a living room, with a lower-third reading ILLINOIS CASHLESS BAIL, SUSPECT WAS RELEASED UNDER SAFE-T ACT. The segment also shows footage of a man speaking with a microphone while seated on a stage at a National Action Network event, with a lower-third reading PRITZKER CLAIMS I.C.E. AND CBP INVADED CHICAGO.

script.scene: A split screen shows a studio anchor and a woman on a video link; lower-third reads ILLINOIS CASHLESS BAIL, SUSPECT WAS RELEASED UNDER SAFE-T ACT.
A man speaks with a microphone seated on a stage at a National Action Network event; lower-third reads PRITZKER CLAIMS I.C.E. AND CBP INVADED CHICAGO.
The woman continues speaking on the video link; the FOX NEWS LIVE banner remains.

notable_text: FOX NEWS LIVE; ILLINOIS CASHLESS BAIL; SUSPECT WAS RELEASED UNDER SAFE-T ACT; PRITZKER CLAIMS I.C.E. AND CBP INVADED CHICAGO; NEW YORK CITY
